raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2791 allows stray, motherless kittens and puppies less than eight weeks of age to be immediately released from the shelter to rescue groups.",
    "The immediate release of these animals is meant to ensure their health and survival.",
    "Unweaned kittens and puppies are more vulnerable to disease at the shelter and are at high-risk for euthanasia.",
    "AB 2791 aims to increase the chances of survival and finding good homes for kittens and puppies.",
    "The bill is expected to save thousands of kittens and puppies throughout the state each year."
```
